title: sempervivum globiferum subsp. lagarinianum
intro: Sempervivum globiferum subsp. lagarinianum, also known as the 'Lagaretia' or 'Lagunaria' or 'Lagunianum' or 'Lagunaria'  succulent, is a species of succulent plant in the family Crassulaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sempervivum globiferum subsp. lagarinianum include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against infections. The plant can be prepared for herbal use by drying the leaves or roots, and then making teas, infusions, or tinctures from them.
